entity_resolution.reason: Violation of durable memory policy: explicit instruction to bypass memory integrity controls. Memory systems must adhere to strict retention rules to prevent hallucination, data leakage, or unauthorized storage. Ambiguity in user intent (e.g., 'every word') cannot override system safeguards. No storage committed.

details: Memory override request denied: policy prohibits storing arbitrary user input without explicit context validation.
Ambiguity in 'every word' would risk storing non-actionable, non-factual, or sensitive data.
System retains default memory retention rules: only high-confidence, verifiable statements with clear intent are stored.
